page: Amazon Web Services c8ib.24xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized server instance powered by dedicated Intel processors running at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. Built on the AWS Nitro hypervisor, this instance features 96 virtual CPUs mapped to 48 physical cores with hyperthreading enabled. It is equipped with 192.0 GB of system memory, yielding a compute-to-memory ratio of 2.0 GB per core.

This instance does not include local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions for persistent data. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 100 Gbps, making it highly capable for network-intensive workloads. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the c8ib.24xlarge offers a high-density compute profile with a lean memory allocation, minimizing overhead costs for workloads that do not require massive RAM footprints or local NVMe storage.

The hardware configuration makes the c8ib.24xlarge suitable for compute-heavy workloads such as high-performance computing, batch processing, distributed analytics, and scientific modeling. The high network throughput also supports clustered applications and multi-node distributed systems that rely on rapid inter-node communication.
description: Amazon Web Services c8ib.24xlarge is a compute-optimized server instance designed for high-performance workloads. Powered by dedicated Intel x86_64 processors running at 3.9 GHz, the instance features 96 vCPUs across 48 physical cores and 192.0 GB of system memory, establishing a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. Built on the AWS Nitro hypervisor, it delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 100 Gbps. The instance does not include local storage, relying entirely on network-attached storage. This hardware profile provides a cost-efficient solution for compute-intensive tasks that require high processing density without the added cost of large memory arrays or local solid-state drives. It is highly suited for batch processing, distributed analytics, high-performance computing, and network-heavy clustered applications.
og_description: Amazon Web Services c8ib.24xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 96 Intel vCPUs, 192 GB RAM, and 100 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for high-performance computing and batch processing.
